repos.readme: ShipGuard combines code audit, process checking, visual E2E review, recorder, scout, and improve skills. The 2.3.4 cycle adds canonical visual-results.json, dashboard smoke tests, monitor smoke tests, dry-run documentation, sandbox guidance, and stronger review contracts.

files.content: Starts an isolated review fixture, builds review.html, starts a local server, checks audit-results.json, visual-results.json, persona reports, POST /save-manifest, and encoded path traversal rejection.
Starts an isolated review server and exercises audit monitor endpoints: audit-start, agent-update, status, audit-complete, and persisted audit-monitor.json.
Documents sandbox constraints for local servers, browser automation, GitHub/network calls, and write paths.
